debug_info.goal:
n : ↑(Set.Ioi 1)
⊢ IsLeast
    {k |
      ∀ (A B : IMO2020P4.Company (↑n) k),
        ∃ i j, IMO2020P4.Company.linked (↑n) k A i j ∧ IMO2020P4.Company.linked (↑n) k B i j}
    (IMO2020P4.answer n)

failed_attempts:
have hn : 2 ≤ (n : ℕ) := Nat.le_of_lt n.2
  let N := (n : ℕ) ^ 2
  constructor
  · intro A B
    let k := answer n
    let root (C : Company n k) (i : Fin N) : Fin N :=
      if h : ∃ j, (C.cars j).finish = i then root C (C.cars h.some).start else i
    termination_by i
    decreasing_by exact (C.cars _).start_lt_finish.trans_eq (Classical.choose_spec h).symm
    let f (i : Fin N) := (root A i, root B i)
    have : ¬ Function.Injective f := fun h ↦ by
      let S (C : Company n k) := (Finset.univ : Finset (Fin N)).filter (fun i ↦ ∀ j, (C.cars j).finish ≠ i)
      have hc (C : Company n k) : (S C).card = n - 1 := by
        simp [S, N, k, answer, Nat.sub_sub_assoc, Nat.add_sub_cancel_left, Nat.mul_sub_left_distrib]
        rw [← Fintype.card_fin N]; exact Fintype.card_subtype_compl _
      have hr (C : Company n k) : ∀ i, root C i ∈ S C := fun i ↦ by
        rw [Finset.mem_filter]; use Finset.mem_univ _; by_contra h; obtain ⟨j, hj⟩ := not_forall.1 h
        rw [root, dif_pos ⟨j, hj⟩] at *; exact (C.cars j).start_lt_finish.ne (hj.symm.trans (Eq.symm <| Classical.choose_spec _))
      have : Fintype.card (Fin N) ≤ Fintype.card (S A × S B) := Fintype.card_le_of_injective (fun i ↦ ⟨⟨root A i, hr A i⟩, ⟨root B i, hr B i⟩⟩) (fun x y e ↦ h (Prod.ext (Subtype.ext (Prod.ext_iff.1 e).1) (Subtype.ext (Prod.ext_iff.1 e).2)))
      simp [hc, N] at this; nlinarith
    obtain ⟨x, y, hne, hf⟩ := Finite.exists_ne_map_eq_of_card_lt (by simp [N]; nlinarith) f
    wlog hxy : x < y generalizing x y; · exact (this y x hne.symm hf.symm).imp (fun i ↦ Exists.imp (fun j ↦ And.symm) (hxy y x hne.symm hf.symm (Nat.le_of_not_lt hxy)))
    use x, y; constructor <;> {
      let C := if _ then A else B; have : root C x = root C y := by simp_all
      induction y using Nat.strong_induction_on generalizing x with | h y ih =>
      unfold root at this; split at this <;> rename_i hC
      · obtain ⟨c, hc⟩ := hC; have : (C.cars c).start < y := (C.cars c).start_lt_finish.trans_eq hc.symm
        by_cases hsx : (C.cars c).start = x
        · subst hsx; exact ⟨{ cars := [c], nonempty := by simp, valid := by simp [hc] }, rfl, hc⟩
        · obtain ⟨L, hl⟩ := ih _ this x (lt_of_le_of_ne (Nat.le_of_lt_succ (Nat.succ_le_of_lt this)) hsx) (this.trans (Classical.choose_spec hC).symm.rec)
          exact ⟨{ cars := L.cars ++ [c], nonempty := by simp, valid := by simp [hl.2, hc, List.chain_append_cons_cons, L.valid] }, hl.1, hc⟩
      · rw [this] at hxy; exact (hxy.ne rfl).elim }
  · intro k hk
    let n' := (n : ℕ) - 1
    let car_idx (i : Fin (n * n')) : Fin n × Fin n' := (i / n', i % n')
    let mk_cars (map : Fin n × Fin n' → Fin N × Fin N) (i : Fin (n * n')) : Car n :=
      { start := (map (car_idx i)).1, finish := (map (car_idx i)).2, start_lt_finish := by sorry }
    let A : Company n k := sorry -- Construct row company
    let B : Company n k := sorry -- Construct col company
    exact ⟨A, B, fun i j ⟨_, _, hA⟩ ⟨_, _, hB⟩ ↦ (hA.ne hB).elim⟩
